Selling s YES: (yesR + s - c)(noR - c) = k   c\u00b2 - (yesR + s + noR)c + noR*s = 0"}},"notice":"Fixed Product Market Maker (FPMM) prediction market.         Collateral: Any IERC20 (USDC, EURC, \u2026). Outcome tokens tracked         internally (no ERC20 per outcome).         Invariant: yesReserve * noReserve = k (constant across trades, grows with liquidity).         BUY formula (buying YES with c collateral):           tokensOut = (yesR + c) - k / (noR + c)           yesR_new  = k / (noR + c),  noR_new = noR + c         SELL formula (selling s YES for c collateral) \u2014 quadratic solve:           (yesR + s - c)(noR - c) = k           c\u00b2 - (yesR + s + noR)c + noR * s = 0           c = [(yesR+s+noR) - sqrt((yesR+s+noR)\u00b2 - 4*noR*s)] / 2         Resolution: owner-controlled. params.isYes: true = buy YES, false = buy NO

params._deadline: Unix timestamp; resolution expected by this date
params._initLiquidity: Initial collateral already transferred by factory
params._owner: Address that can resolve (receives initial LP shares)

params.isYes: true = sell YES, false = sell NO

usdc().details: Returns the collateral token address.      Kept so existing USDC deployments (which expose a `usdc()` getter      from the old immutable name) and `markets.ts` `functionName:"usdc"`      calls remain compatible without an ABI change.

addLiquidity(uint256).notice: Add collateral liquidity, preserving the current YES/NO price ratio.

buyOutcome(bool,uint256,uint256).notice: Buy YES or NO outcome tokens with collateral.   Buying YES with c collateral:     k = yesR * noR     tokensOut = (yesR + c) - k / (noR + c)     yesR_new  = k / (noR + c),  noR_new = noR + c

deleteAndRefundOwner().notice: Permanently freeze the market and refund all collateral to the owner.         Only the factory can call this, and only when no trader positions         or external LPs exist.

getMarketInfo().notice: Returns all market state needed by the frontend in one call.

getPrice(bool).notice: Returns implied probability as 1e18-scaled fixed point.         After resolution: winning side = 1e18, losing side = 0.         Before resolution: price(YES) = noReserve / (yesReserve + noReserve)

redeem().notice: Redeem winning tokens 1:1 for collateral after resolution.

removeLiquidity(uint256).notice: Remove liquidity proportional to LP share ownership.         Only callable after resolution — LP capital is locked until the market settles.

resolve(bool).notice: Resolve the market. onlyOwner.         TODO: integrate Chainlink CRE automation trigger here.

sellOutcome(bool,uint256,uint256).notice: Sell YES or NO outcome tokens back for collateral.   Selling s YES: (yesR + s - c)(noR - c) = k   c² - (yesR + s + noR)c + noR*s = 0
